source.raw_source_text:
Kategori: Sauces / Condiments

Recipe: Eldrök

Alternativa titlar:
Rökglans
BBQ-Natt
Mesquite Kiss
Glödsås

Note: Rökig BBQ-sås i mesquite-stil. Passar till burgare, kyckling, ribs och grillade wraps.

Difficulty: Enkel
Ingredients: 1,2 dl ketchup, 1 msk melass, 1 tsk mesquitekrydda eller 2–3 droppar liquid smoke + 1/2 tsk rökt paprikapulver, 1 tsk äppelcidervinäger, 1 tsk Worcestershiresås, 1 krm salt, 1 krm svartpeppar.

Serves: 2–3 portioner
Preparation time: 5 min
Cooking time: 5–7 min
Cooking process: Sjuda i kastrull
Wine pairing: Zinfandel eller shiraz
Rating: ☆☆☆☆☆

Preparation:
Lägg ketchup, melass, mesquitekrydda eller liquid smoke med rökt paprika, äppelcidervinäger, Worcestershiresås, salt och svartpeppar i en liten kastrull. Låt såsen sjuda på låg värme i 5–7 minuter under omrörning tills den blir jämn, glansig och lite tjockare. Smaka av och låt svalna något före servering så att smaken hinner sätta sig.

Vad jag ändrade och varför:
Jag skrev om receptet till ett kompakt journalformat som passar fälten i din bok och gav det en mer stämningsfull titel med alternativ att välja mellan. Jag behöll receptets kärna, men gjorde metoden tätare och tydligare för att fungera bättre som en kort, handskriven anteckning.

candidate_update.title: Eldrök
candidate_update.short_description: Smoky BBQ-style sauce in mesquite style, suitable for burgers, chicken, ribs, and grilled wraps.
candidate_update.notes: Rewritten from a compact journal format to fit archive fields. Core recipe preserved, method clarified for better function as a short handwritten note.
candidate_update.service_notes: Pairs well with burgers, chicken, ribs, and grilled wraps. Suggested wine pairings: Zinfandel or Shiraz.

ingredients.preparation: or 2-3 drops liquid smoke + 1/2 tsp smoked paprika
ingredients.display_text: 1 tsk mesquite spice (or 2-3 drops liquid smoke + 1/2 tsp smoked paprika)

steps.instruction: Combine ketchup, molasses, mesquite spice or liquid smoke with smoked paprika, apple cider vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and black pepper in a small saucepan.
Simmer the sauce over low heat for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it becomes smooth, glossy, and slightly thicker.
Taste and adjust seasoning. Let cool slightly before serving to allow flavors to settle.

uncertainty_notes: Amount units (msk, tsk, krm) are Swedish abbreviations not fully standardized in English; converted to approximate equivalents but original units preserved in ingredient notes where needed.
Source text includes author's meta-notes about rewriting the recipe; these are preserved in recipe_notes but not translated into uncertainty_notes unless they affect ingredient or step clarity.
candidate_extras.confidence_summary: High confidence in core recipe structure and ingredients. Some unit conversions from Swedish abbreviations may require verification against standard English measurements. Source text includes author's meta-commentary which is preserved in recipe_notes.
